summary: Targeted bug-fix verification for the homepage 'Why We Are Better' area. Verified (a) CollageSection now displays the correct product-collage image (chandeliers/lamps mosaic with the copper '1000+ LIGHT OPTIONS INSIDE' badge baked in), (b) no duplicate CSS 1000+ overlay is present, (c) no 'Reasons Why We Are Better' heading or mosaic-bowl screenshot is inside the collage section, (d) ReasonsSection is pure HTML with 8 text/icon cards (0 elements, 8 SVG icons, all 8 titles match exactly), (e) 390px mobile has no horizontal overflow and cards stack in single column, (f) /about still renders ReasonsSection, /catalog still loads with no errors.
passed: Collage section has exactly 1 with src=/collage.png (natural 527x716) — product collage asset
Collage section text does NOT contain 'Reasons Why We Are Better'
No standalone '1000+' CSS overlay nodes in collage section (badge appears exactly once, baked into image)
Copy '1000+ Light Options Inside' present as heading text in collage section
All 8 reason cards (reason-0..reason-7) present with exact expected titles
8 inline SVG icons rendered inside reasons-section
Mobile 390px: reason cards stack in single column (reason-1 below reason-0)
Mobile 390px: collage image fits within viewport (342px wide)
Regression: /catalog loads with no error elements
notes: Screenshots visually confirm: collage shows chandelier product mosaic with a single circular copper '1000+ LIGHT OPTIONS INSIDE' badge baked in; reasons section renders 8 clean text/icon cards on a dark themed background. Bug fix verified.
